projects.name: NearH
projects.description: Centralized real-time healthcare network for India, bridging the communication gap during medical emergencies through live resource tracking.
keyPoints: Architected a centralized healthcare network using Next.js 16 and Supabase, implementing multi-tenant isolation to provide live tracking of bed, ICU, and blood bank availability.
Engineered a multi-tier distributed caching strategy using Upstash Redis, reducing database read load by 60% and maintaining sub-100ms latency for critical resource discovery.
Provisioned a secure data layer using Supabase Row Level Security (RLS) and Edge Rate Limiting, ensuring 100% data integrity for inter-hospital patient referrals.
Designed an RBAC-protected dashboard for hospitals to manage live inventory and streamline emergency response coordination.

projects.name: Infybite
projects.description: High-concurrency multi-tenant system built with Go to digitize enterprise food court operations and inventory tracking.
keyPoints: Designed and implemented a Go-based multi-tenant management system with 4-level RBAC (Admin, Vendor, Manager, User), streamlining food court operations and inventory workflows.
Built a high-concurrency WebSocket hub in Go to synchronize real-time menu state for 16,000+ concurrent users, incorporating slow-client disconnection to maintain <50ms latency.
Developed a secure authentication pipeline using JWT + HttpOnly cookies, enabling silent token rotation with 100% session reliability while mitigating XSS and CSRF attacks.
Architected a scalable data model using GORM and MongoDB to handle high-frequency transaction logs and independent vendor state management.

projects.name: Mess-Bazaar
projects.description: Next.js bidding platform connecting mess contractors with institutions through a competitive real-time tendering system.
keyPoints: Orchestrated a full-stack tendering platform using Next.js and Prisma, supporting 10+ production-grade pages for complex institutional bidding workflows.
Engineered real-time synchronization for instant bid updates, maintaining 100% data consistency across diverse institutional dashboards.
Optimized relational queries via Prisma ORM, implementing efficient indexing and parallel data fetching that reduced server-side latency by 30%.
Developed a mobile-responsive UI with Framed Motion and Tailwind CSS, featuring a 5-point rating system and real-time Socket.IO chat.

projects.name: Gossipyfy
projects.description: Anonymous voice-first social platform with scalable audio streaming and multilingual content support.
keyPoints: Developed a secure media mutation pipeline using Server Actions and Zod validation, significantly reducing client-side bundle size while enhancing security.
Built an enterprise-grade storage infrastructure using AWS S3 for scalable audio uploads and category-based content streaming.
Standardized authentication with NextAuth and custom Middleware to neutralize XSS/CSRF risks while supporting Google OAuth and secure sessions.
Integrated Razorpay for server-side payment handling and automated webhook verification to ensure accurate billing for digital services.

projects.name: Canteen Connect
projects.description: Cross-platform food delivery ecosystem for campus cafeterias, reducing peak-hour wait times.
keyPoints: Digitized campus canteen workflows using a MERN-based admin panel and a Flutter mobile app, resulting in a significant reduction in queue wait times.
Implemented a real-time order tracking system using WebSockets to provide users with live updates on preparation and pickup status.
Engineered specialized administrative features for menu management, live inventory tracking, and sales analytics.
Provisioned secure payment gateway integration and Firebase-based authentication for robust user data privacy.

projects.name: E-Estate
projects.description: High-performance real estate marketplace featuring advanced search algorithms and optimized asset management.
keyPoints: Constructed an advanced property search engine with dynamic filters for location, pricing, and amenities to enhance user discovery.
Optimized cloud asset management by leveraging Firebase for image storage, reducing MongoDB storage costs and improving page load speeds.
Implemented secure JWT-based authentication protocols and Google Sign-In for a seamless and protected user onboarding experience.
Built a responsive property listing dashboard with automated image compression and lazy loading for high-density visual content.

projects.name: E-Commerce Web App
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce solution with integrated payment processing and comprehensive administrative controls.
keyPoints: Designed and shipped independent Admin and User modules, featuring comprehensive inventory management and order lifecycle tracking.
Integrated a secure Stripe/Razorpay payment gateway to facilitate reliable end-to-end e-commerce transactions.
Developed a dynamic product discovery system with real-time search filters and a persistent shopping cart state.
Implemented centralized error-handling and global state management to ensure a high-availability shopping experience.
